docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY FINNEMAN, MARK AS TO DEFENDANT BRUNNER, HEINZ ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-26-1996 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT C
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT BRUNNER, HEINZ

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FINNEMAN, MARK RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BRUNNER, HEINZ $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $15.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,015.00, TO BE PAID BY MONEY ORDER OR CASHIER'S CHECK. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT BRUNNER, HEINZ
